heading: Reserve components: personnel and logistic support by military departments
label: 18501 Reserve components: personnel and logistic support by military departments
text: The Secretary concerned is responsible for providing the personnel, equipment, facilities, and other general logistic support necessary to enable units and Reserves in the Ready Reserve of the reserve components under his jurisdiction to satisfy the training requirements and mobilization readiness requirements for those units and Reserves as recommended by the Secretary concerned and by the Chairman of the Joint Chiefs of Staff and approved by the Secretary of Defense, and as recommended by the Commandant of the Coast Guard and approved by the Secretary of Homeland Security when the Coast Guard is not operated as a service of the Navy.
notes: Prior ProvisionsProvisions similar to those in this section were contained in , prior to repeal by .section 264(b) of this titlePub. L. 103–337, § 1661(a)(2)(A)
Amendments2002— substituted “of Homeland Security” for “of Transportation”.Pub. L. 107–296
